debug_info.goal:
case refine_3
G : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : Group G
K : ℝ
inst✝ : DecidableEq G
A : Finset G
hA₀ : A.Nonempty
hA : ↑(A ^ 2).card ≤ K * ↑A.card
hK : 1 ≤ K
S : Finset G := {g ∈ A⁻¹ * A | ↑A.card / (2 * K) ≤ ↑(MulOpposite.op g • A ∩ A).card}
hS₁ : 1 ∈ S
hS₀ : S.Nonempty
hSA : S ⊆ A⁻¹ * A
hSsymm : S⁻¹ = S
hScard : ↑S.card ≤ K ^ 2 * ↑A.card
F : Finset G
hFA : F ⊆ A
hFcard : ↑F.card ≤ 2 * K
hASF : A ⊆ S * F
⊢ ∃ a ∈ A, ↑A.card / (2 * K) ≤ ↑(A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • S ^ 2).card

failed_attempts:
sorry
      sorry
    refine ⟨a, hFA haF, ?_⟩
    calc (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #(A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • S) := ha
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • S ^ 2) := by
        gcongr; exact Finset.smul_finset_subset_smul_finset (sq_subset_sq hS₁)

have : 2 * K * (#A / (2 * K)) = #A := by field_simp
      linarith
    exact ⟨a, hFA haF, by calc (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #(A ∩ S <• a) := ha
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S ^ 2 <• a) := by gcongr; exact Finset.subset_pow_of_mem_one hS₁ one_lt_two⟩
